We recommend the BitBox02 hardware wallet to our users because, like the Relai app, it makes handling Bitcoin easy, fun, and secure!
Use code RELAI21 for a 5% discount.

Buy Bitcoin and increase your purchasing power exponentially.
Use code DAVANI for a 5% discount

Keyvan Davani - Host of The Keyvan Davani Connection podcast

It isn't necessary to take someone's word for it that their software is secure when the software is 100% open-source. BitBox provides that, and that fact alone puts it ahead of other hardware wallets. Don't trust your crypto to others.
Use code FTL to get a 5% discount!

Free Talk Live

Unsurpassed security that is easy to use, convenient and the cold wallet I trust with my coins!

Brian Logen

The BitBox is the Swiss Army Knife of hardware wallets. It does everything you need, with a sleek design perfect for crypto security beginners. Easy-to-use, but powerful enough when needed most - like me!

Karhrman Ziegenbein - Crypto Crime Expert

After buying Bitcoin, the most important question to ask yourself is: What’s the best way to keep them secure? BitBox is my personal favorite hardware wallet, and the one I always recommend to my family & friends.
Plus, by using code ROBIN you even get 5% off your order.

Robin Seyr

Voor beginners kunnen we de BitBox02 van harte aanbevelen; De combinatie van gebruiksgemak, optimale veiligheid en volledige open source software, maakt de BitBox02 een ideaal device om je Bitcoin private key in op te slaan.

Paul & Marina von BitcoinSchoolNL

We met at a conference and we're happy you're here! The BitBox helps you achieve self-custody and secure your coins without counterparty risk.
Use discount code CONF4027 for 5% off!

I love the BitBox02 for its Bitcoin-only focus, top-notch security, and sleek, intuitive design—perfect for secure and simple self-custody.
Use code SELLFIAT to get your 5% discount!

David Bergfeld – Founder & CEO of Bergfeld Foundation

The BitBox is my go-to wallet in my courses. Easy to use and functions even for Bitcoin professionals. Great product from a great team!
Get 5% off with my Code BTCMENTOR.

Thomas "Bitcoin-Mentor" Lohbeck

BitBox02 hardware wallet

Keeping your crypto secure doesn't have to be hard. With the BitBox02 your coins are safe, with you.

Trustpilot
Swiss made  open source  security  design  independence
Shop now

Secure your crypto offline

Information stored online is vulnerable

Your cryptocurrency private keys can be stolen at any point if you use an online exchange or software wallet.

Safely store and manage your coins offline

The BitBox02 hardware wallet stores the private keys for your cryptocurrencies offline. So you can manage your coins safely.

Learn more Buy now

I have a great sense of security when using it and I can depend on its performance. BitBox02 has been a beautiful and most importantly reliable tool to protect and direct capital. I highly recommend it.

Ben Howard, Founder paybtc.com.au

The device is well designed and the interaction with it is 10/10. Tapping, sliding and holding down non-existent buttons gives it a premium feel. The usability is delightful.

Lunaticoin, LNTCN podcast

Best for beginners

One of the simplest hardware wallet for beginners, BitBox02 boasts a fast setup, microSD backup, in-app guide, and intuitive touch sliders.

Tatiana Koffman, Forbes
Trustpilot
See all reviews

Stay in control of your coins

Get started in 5 minutes

Setup your BitBox02 in moments. The intuitive interface makes it easier than ever to stay in control of your crypto assets.

The BitBox02 supports Bitcoin, Litecoin, Cardano, Ethereum, Chainlink, BAT and 1500+ more.

See all supported cryptocurrencies

Advanced features for power users

The BitBox02 is simple yet powerful. Whether you are new or an expert in the crypto space, the BitBox02 has all the features you need for financial independence.

See all the features

Secure and simple

Keeping your crypto safe doesn't have to be complicated. The BitBox02 hardware wallet gives you peace of mind knowing your coins are safe with you.

Get your BitBox02

Which version is right for you?

Everything you need to start your crypto journey

Multi-cryptocurrency hardware wallet and U2F authenticator. Supports Bitcoin, Litecoin, Cardano, Ethereum and 1500+ tokens.

See all supported cryptocurrencies

Explore the BitBox02

For those who only want to hold Bitcoin

The BitBox02 for the pure bitcoiner. No distractions, radically focused firmware. Bitcoin and nothing else, ever.

Simple yet powerful

The BitBoxApp is at the center of the BitBox ecosystem. An all-in-one solution to securely manage your coins.

Swiss precision

Known for its precision engineering and attention to detail, Switzerland produces some of the highest quality products in the world.

The BitBox02 software and hardware are designed and manufactured in Switzerland to give you the best possible product.

Learn more about us

Hardware wallet comparison

Hardware wallet comparison
BitBox02 with BitBoxApp Ledger Nano X with Ledger Live Trezor Safe 5 with Trezor Suite
Open-source
BitBoxApp and firmware are fully open source
Crypto firmware runs directly on secure chip, which is protected with "non-disclosure agreements" and prohibits release of program code
Web wallet and firmware are fully open source
Secure chip
Dual chip design using a secure chip
Fully trusts secure chip only
Dual chip design using a secure chip
Secure Multisig
Register multisig account with device, automatically verify for secure send/receive
Register multisig account with device, automatically verify for secure send/receive
Cannot automatically verify that the co-signers are safe, must be manually checked for every receiving transaction
Simple setup
Fast and simple setup. Backup instantly on microSD card, no need to write seed words
No instant microSD card backup, must manually write down recovery words
No instant microSD card backup, must manually write down recovery words
Easy backup & recovery
Instant backup and recovery with microSD card, optionally write down recovery words
Manually write down recovery words on paper
Manually write down recovery words on paper
Native desktop app
BitBoxApp
Ledger Live
Trezor Suite
Mobile app
Fully featured Android
Android / iOS
Android
Genuine check
The BitBoxApp checks the BitBox02 device is authentic.
Ledger Live checks the Ledger device is authentic.
Trezor Suite checks the Trezor device is authentic.
Coins & tokens support
In app support for BTC, LTC, ETH and selected tokens. ADA with AdaLite and 1500+ ERC20 tokens supported with MyEtherWallet.
Variety of coins supported
Variety of coins supported
Insurance integration
Optional bitcoin insurance directly integrated in the BitBoxApp
No integration
No integration

Storing data on the blockchain: How does OP_RETURN actually work?

Storing data on the blockchain: How does OP_RETURN actually work?

Explaining the ongoing debate about removing size limitations of OP_RETURN outputs, and arbitrary data on the Bitcoin blockchain in general. Read more

Import and export wallet labels with BIP-329

Import and export wallet labels with BIP-329

The BIP-329 standard enables the easy transfer of transaction notes and labels between different wallet software, including the BitBoxApp. Read more

Except where otherwise noted, content on this site is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License

BitBox® is a line of physical, non-custodial hardware wallets and accessories created by Shift Crypto AG. BitBox devices are designed to store users’ private keys locally and never transmit them. Shift Crypto AG does not provide financial, investment, or custodial services. Users are solely responsible for the management, security, and backup of their wallet credentials. Use of this website and our products is subject to our Terms of Service, Privacy Policy and other policies.
